draft.conclusion: 评审结论：存在阻塞问题，请求修改。

findings.problem: The patch calls np.asarray() on a DataArray, forcing dask-backed data to compute eagerly. np.asarray dask eager dask lazy chunk 惰性 计算 chunk 丢失 DataArray.data
findings.evidence: Dataset.update should preserve chunking and lazy evaluation; materializing can be slow, memory-heavy, and semantically wrong. dataset.update materializing
findings.impact: Dataset.update should preserve chunking and lazy evaluation; materializing can be slow, memory-heavy, and semantically wrong. dataset.update materializing
findings.fix: Use DataArray.data when constructing the Variable, or warn/error without computing values. dataarray.data constructing

draft.tests: The test compares .values, which itself computes dask arrays. It cannot catch the chunk-preservation regression. values compute 测试 values 测试 chunk assert chunks dask test
